title: Creator Personal Brand Identity Mockup AI Prompt
sourceTitle: Minimal Creator Personal Brand Identity Mockup AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Minimal personal branding identity mockup featuring fictional female founder personal-brand kit with portrait, line-art face logo, tee, tote and ceramic mug. Subject: fictional female founder personal-brand kit with portrait, line-art face logo, tee, tote and ceramic mug is the complete creator or entrepreneur brand kit, combining portrait, circular hand-drawn line-art face logo, merchandise mockups, social content tiles, and consistent identity elements. Scene: grid-style social media board with quote tiles, behind-the-scenes content and warm neutral brand blocks provides the soft neutral presentation setting with grid-style social layout, brand blocks, merchandise surfaces, tabletop or agency-board arrangement, and calm editorial spacing. Composition: Fixed balanced editorial brand-board composition: framed portrait, circular logo mark, white tee, tote bag, ceramic mug or stationery, quote tiles, behind-the-scenes panels, solid color blocks, and consistent typography arranged as a premium creative-agency presentation. Signature Elements: Framed portrait, circular line-art face logo, white tee, tote bag, ceramic mug, social grid tiles, quote cards, warm neutral brand blocks, consistent typography, and premium creator-brand presentation. Style: Minimal personal branding identity mockup with Scandinavian-inspired aesthetic, soft natural lighting, premium lifestyle photography, warm neutral background, high-end creative agency presentation, consistent brand typography, and polished editorial layout. Color Palette: Warm beige, cream, muted terracotta, soft gray, white merchandise surfaces, subtle paper texture, neutral lifestyle shadows, and restrained brand accent colors. Lighting: Soft natural light with gentle shadows on paper, fabric, mug, tote, portrait frame, and brand blocks, giving the mockup a premium lifestyle photography feel. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: LUNA STUDIO / CREATE WITH CLARITY appears as the brand name, tagline, and limited quote or identity text across the logo, portrait frame, social tiles, and merchandise, all short and readable. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Scene: soft neutral tabletop with linen texture, beige-gray paper, embossed business card and muted architectural sketches provides the soft neutral presentation setting with grid-style social layout, brand blocks, merchandise surfaces, tabletop or agency-board arrangement, and calm editorial spacing. Composition: Fixed balanced editorial brand-board composition: framed portrait, circular logo mark, white tee, tote bag, ceramic mug or stationery, quote tiles, behind-the-scenes panels, solid color blocks, and consistent typography arranged as a premium creative-agency presentation. Signature Elements: Framed portrait, circular line-art face logo, white tee, tote bag, ceramic mug, social grid tiles, quote cards, warm neutral brand blocks, consistent typography, and premium creator-brand presentation. Lighting: Soft natural light with gentle shadows on paper, fabric, mug, tote, portrait frame, and brand blocks, giving the mockup a premium lifestyle photography feel. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: MIRA VALE / INTERIOR STUDIO / SPACE WITH INTENTION appears as the brand name, tagline, and limited quote or identity text across the logo, portrait frame, social tiles, and merchandise, all short and readable. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
